description: Trigger, acknowledge, or resolve a PagerDuty incident via the Events API v2.

INTEGRATION_KEY_SECRET.description: Secret key_path storing the PagerDuty Events API v2 integration key (e.g. pagerduty/integration_key)

SUMMARY.description: Short human-readable summary of the alert (shown as the incident title in PagerDuty)

ACTION.description: Event action to send to PagerDuty

SOURCE.description: Optional: machine-readable name of the component that caused the alert (e.g. 'api-server', 'db-primary')

DEDUP_KEY.description: Optional deduplication key. Subsequent events with the same key update the existing incident instead of creating a new one.

setup_instructions.title: Create a PagerDuty integration
setup_instructions.detail: In PagerDuty, navigate to Services → select or create a service → Integrations → Add Integration → Events API v2.

setup_instructions.title: Copy the integration key
setup_instructions.detail: Copy the Integration Key shown on the integration detail page.

setup_instructions.title: Store the key as a secret
setup_instructions.detail: Use set_secret with key_path='pagerduty/integration_key' and the copied key as the value.

setup_instructions.title: Configure this node
setup_instructions.detail: Set INTEGRATION_KEY_SECRET='pagerduty/integration_key' and SUMMARY to a descriptive alert message. Optionally set ACTION, SEVERITY, SOURCE, and DEDUP_KEY.
